channel.title: Json on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Json on Arrans github.io

item.title: johnkerl/miller
item.description: Miller is like awk, sed, cut, join, and sort for name-indexed data such as CSV, TSV, and tabular JSON

item.title: wader/fq
item.description: jq for binary formats - tool, language and decoders for working with binary and text formats

item.title: streamich/json-joy
item.description: JSON CRDT, JSON CRDT Patch, JSON Patch+, JSON Predicate, JSON Pointer, JSON Expression, JSON Type

item.title: TomWright/dasel
item.description: Select, put and delete data from JSON, TOML, YAML, XML and CSV files with a single tool. Supports conversion between formats and can be used as a Go package.

item.title: Boeing/config-file-validator
item.description: Cross Platform tool to validate configuration files

item.title: TheLastGimbus/GooglePhotosTakeoutHelper
item.description: Script that organizes the Google Takeout archive into one big chronological folder

item.title: wI2L/jsondiff
item.description: Compute the diff between two JSON documents as a series of RFC6902 (JSON Patch) operations

item.title: codyogden/killedbygoogle
item.description: Part guillotine, part graveyard for Google’s doomed apps, services, and hardware.

item.title: jzelinskie/faq
item.description: Format Agnostic jQ – process various formats with libjq

item.title: hashicorp/hcl
item.description: HCL is the HashiCorp configuration language.

item.title: francoispqt/gojay
item.description: high performance JSON encoder/decoder with stream API for Golang
